title: FoodPack
description: Changes the cooked food to real food etc. Hamburger, fries
body:
Food Pack by solvise 

Food Pack adds a more simple and more real food to the game

Mods like Optifine are not required


![FoodPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bccb9f8c7d65b86c71ae610edebe39d6ccb189de.png)
